name: content-locale-pair
description: Opens the matching locale content file in a split editor

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run package
scripts.install: npm run build && cursor --install-extension out/content-locale-pair-0.0.4.vsix && cursor --reload

contentLocalePair.enabled.description: Automatically open the paired locale file in a split editor

contentLocalePair.contentRoot.description: Path to the content folder containing locale subfolders (e.g. src/content)

contentLocalePair.locales.description: The two locale folder names to pair in a split editor

contentLocalePair.leftLocale.description: Locale shown in the left editor column when a content pair is opened

contentLocalePair.closePairOnClose.description: Close the paired locale file when one side of the pair is closed
